name: Acme Bank Reference Data
description: Source data for Acme Bank: a synthetic four-entity investment-bank holding group (Group, UK, US, HK) with LEIs, business units, portfolios, books, and staff accounts, used as the system's fully-populated reference/demo entity.

methodologies.name: OreStudio Code Generation Methodology
methodologies.description: Methodology for generating artefact files using the OreStudio code generator

catalogs.name: Acme Bank
catalogs.description: Synthetic investment-bank holding group used to exercise the full system (organisation, RBAC, trading structure).

datasets.name: Acme Bank LEI Entities
datasets.description: Acme Bank's four legal entities (Group, UK, US, HK), each with a checksum-valid synthetic LEI on GLEIF's reserved 9695 test prefix.

datasets.name: Acme Bank LEI Relationships
datasets.description: Parent/subsidiary consolidation relationships linking each Acme Bank office to the holding company.

datasets.name: Acme Bank Business Units
datasets.description: Trading desks (IR Swaps, Credit Trading, FX Rates) and support functions (Middle Office, Market Risk) per Acme Bank office.

datasets.name: Acme Bank Portfolios
datasets.description: One physical portfolio per desk, rolled up under a per-office virtual Global Markets portfolio.

datasets.name: Acme Bank Books
datasets.description: One trading book per desk portfolio.

datasets.name: Acme Bank Staff Accounts
datasets.description: Locale-appropriate staff accounts (desk heads, traders, managers, analysts) per Acme Bank business unit, one fixed shared password. NOTE: requires a new 'accounts' artefact_type/DQ artefact table/publish-from-dq function -- see the server-side-orchestration follow-up task; this dataset is defined ahead of that infrastructure landing.
datasets.business_context: Staff accounts for Acme Bank, one per desk/support-function role
